name: Meal Planner
description: Plan meals, save recipes, generate weekly shopping lists, and lookup nutrition.
author: Synapse Forge

tools.name: meal-planner.save_recipe
tools.description: Save or update a recipe with ingredients and instructions.

id.description: Optional recipe id (slug). If omitted, generated from name.

tools.name: meal-planner.list_recipes
tools.description: List or search saved recipes by query or tag.

tools.name: meal-planner.plan_week
tools.description: Create or replace a weekly meal plan using saved recipe ids.

tools.name: meal-planner.shopping_list
tools.description: Generate an aggregated shopping list from a weekly meal plan.

tools.name: meal-planner.nutrition_lookup
tools.description: Lookup nutrition facts for an ingredient/food via OpenFoodFacts.
